---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability the script doesn't have yet.
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to do

One or two sentences describing the capability.

## What's the use case

Why does this matter? A real situation where you wanted this is far
more persuasive than a hypothetical one.

## Proposed shape

If you have a rough idea of how it would work (new parameter, new
output section, integration with something), describe it. Otherwise
leave this blank -- the maintainer will sketch one.

## Alternatives considered

What workaround are you using today? What would you give up to get this?

## Out-of-scope guardrails

- Reading from / writing to the SentinelOne API.
- Modifying agent configuration on the host.
- Pulling in npm / pip / cargo / Go dependencies.
- Requiring a non-default Windows or Linux toolchain.

Features that fall in those buckets are usually declined -- the project
is intentionally narrow.
